title: Workout split — leg-day routine + cardio rule
html:
Workout split — leg-day routine + cardio rule

Source: 2024-02-29 Apple Note. A four-line leg-day program plus three macro-rules captured on leap day, mid-final-OSU-spring. Sits inside the broader anabolic scoring / supplement stack training neighborhood.

TL;DR

  • Three macro rules: keep current lifting split, add minimum 1 hour daily cardio, and "never eat before bed — wake up lean." First explicit articulation of the wake-lean heuristic.
  • Leg-day exercises: hamstring curls, leg extensions, calf raises, hack squats — the same hypertrophy menu that recurs in his ISSA CPT-era training.
  • Written ~3 months before the May 2024 Asia trip prep — fits the "get lean before going abroad" pattern visible elsewhere in spring 2024.
  • Note title was modified ~a month later (2024-03-28), suggesting he came back to update it — rare for a one-off list.

Pattern

Pairs with the March 17 health/mind/business/love quadrant from two weeks later — both are scaffolding notes for "what I want to optimize before going to Asia."

Open questions

  • Did the daily-cardio rule survive Shanghai? (probably not — Shanghai walking dominates by default.)
  • Is "wake up lean" a phrase he picked up from a specific lifter or self-coined?

Related
